elements.title: an Iberian beetle
elements.contents: ... that an Iberian beetle (specimen pictured) is undergoing substantial evolution that makes it hard to distinguish from its nearby relatives?

elements.title: Mary Theresa Vidal
elements.contents: ... that Mary Theresa Vidal began her writing career with a collection of Christian moral tales intended to educate convicts and servants?

elements.title: an unreleased video game
elements.contents: ... that an unreleased video game themed around Metallica was described as "Twisted Metal meets Grand Theft Auto"?

elements.title: Susanna Leveson-Gower, Marchioness of Stafford
elements.contents: ... that 18th-century political hostess Susanna Leveson-Gower, Marchioness of Stafford, "sought patronage appointments with the eagerness that some women reserved for cards and scandal"?

elements.title: Flight Around Latvia
elements.contents: ... that Latvian pilots competed in a 1,087 km (675 mi) Flight Around Latvia in 1938, testing both aircraft endurance and fuel efficiency rather than speed?

elements.title: Hyderabad Houston Kingsmen
elements.contents: ... that the Hyderabad Houston Kingsmen are one of two new teams in the Pakistan Super League?

elements.title: one of the two civilian casualties
elements.contents: ... that one of the two civilian casualties in the 2026 US intervention in Venezuela had postponed returning to her native Colombia due to the tensions between the US and Venezuela?

elements.title: Master of the Epître d'Othéa
elements.contents: ... that the Master of the Epître d'Othéa produced illuminated manuscripts almost exclusively for Christine de Pizan, one of the first professional female writers in Europe?

elements.title: Sir Lister Holte
elements.contents: ... that Sir Lister Holte donated his own carriage horses to fight the Jacobites—but may have sympathised with them?
